judge_thought:
Explanation: The question asks in which year Przemysław Czerwiński beat his previous best pole vault of 5.65m. Based on the original table, his performances are as follows:
2006 World Indoor Championships: 5.65m (matches the previous best)
2006 European Championships: 5.65m (matches the previous best)
2010 European Championships: 5.75m (exceeds the previous best)
Therefore, the first year he beat his previous best of 5.65m was in 2010 with a vault of 5.75m. The Prediction Answer of 2010 is correct.
